verses.text: Tu-in Filistia-te in a galkap khempeuh uh Afek-ah khawm uh a, Jezreel gamsunga om tuikhuk gei-ah Israel-te in giahphual sat uh hi
Filistia uliante a za za, a tul tulin a pai laitakin David leh a mite zong Akhish tawh a nungah pai uh hi

Filistia galkap a ukte in, “Hih Hebru mite in hih lai-ah bang hong hih uh ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Akhish in Filistia galkap a ukte kiangah, “Ni tampi, kum tampi kei tawh a omkhin, Israel kumpi Saul' nasempa David hi a, kei kiangah hong tai-a kipanin tuni dongin ama tungah mawhna ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Filistia galkap a ukte ama tungah heh uh hi. Filistia galkap a ukte in ama kiangah, “Amah na koihna munah a ciahkik theihna dingin hih mipa sawlkik in. Gal kidona sungah eite' lang hong suak khading ahih manin galdona sungah eite tawh amah hong kuansuklo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mipa in a topa tawh kilemna bangci bawl ding ahi hiam? Hih lai-a om mite' lutang tawh bawl ding hilo ahi hiam
Amaute khatlekhat in la-in sa-in laam uh a, ‘Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,’ a cihpa uh hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Akhish in David samin ama kiangah, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, nang na thuman a, hih vai-ah kei tawh hong kuankhia-in na ciah ding man ka sa hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei kiangah nong pai-a kipan tuni dong nang tungah khialhna bangmah ka mu kei hi. Ahih hangin uliante in nang hong thukimlo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ciahkik in. Filistia uliante na lungkimloh sak khaklohna dingin lungkim takin ciah in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin David in Akhish kiangah, “Ahih hangin, keimah in bang hih ka hi hiam? Ka to kumpipa' galte do-in ka pai theihlohna dingin nangma nasepna-ah kong tum ni-a kipan tuhun dong na nasempa' tungah bang mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Akhish in David dawngin, “Nang pen keima muhna-ah Pasian' vantung mi khat mah bangin paubaanglo na hihna ka thei hi; ahi zongin Filistia galkap a ukte in, ‘Amah pen eite tawh galphualah hong kuanto lo ding hi,’ ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tawh a hong pai na topa' nasemte tawh zingsangin tho baih un. Zingsangin kipan baih un la, khua a vak phetin kihemkhia un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Filistia gamah a ciahkik dingin David a mite tawh zingsang tungin dingkhia uh a, Filistia-te ahih leh Jezreel khua-ah paito uh hi.
